---
title: get-return
description: "Require Get-prefixed functions to return values."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Require Get-prefixed functions to return values. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func GetClient() { initializeClient() }
```

## Good

```go
func GetClient() *Client { return client }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only get-return`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
